headline: Comfort Systems' Backlog Boom: Can It Overcome Execution Challenges?
summary: FIX's record backlog fuels growth, but can strong execution, modular investments and automation keep profitability on track as project complexity rises?

raw.headline: Comfort Systems' Backlog Boom: Can It Overcome Execution Challenges?

headline: Carrier Completes Sale of Riello to Ariston Group
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, today announced it has completed the sale of its Riello business to Ariston Group for gross proceeds of approximately $440 million.
